title: Strongthium 1/4 Gas Inline Fuel Filter 691035 493629 Replacement for 6mm-7mm ATV Scooter Go Kart Snow Blower Motorcycle Lawn Mower Taotao Small Tractors Generator
features: Fit for 1/4" 6mm-7mm gasoline fuel filter with Clamps. Compatible part number: 493629 691035 5065 49019-7001 56002 794079 84001895. For ATV Scooter Moped Go Kart Dirt Bikes Snowblower Motorcycle Lawnmower Boart Outboard Powersports Small engines Motors and more.

Compatible with MTD Cub Cadet John Deere Troy Bilt Kohler Craftsman Kawasaki Tecumseh Yamaha Toro Husky Huskee, compatible with Briggs and Stratton Riding Mower Tractors Snowmobiles Garden Tillers Go Karts Generators.
Compatible with BRIGGS & STRATTON 5056 5056D 5056K KAWASAKI 49019-7001 49019-7005 OREGON 07-107 07-112 7-07061 7-07106 PRIMER LINE 7-07106-25 STENS 120-158 120-303 120-410 120-754 SUNBELTBISB 7998.
Package includes: 6x fuel filter, 12x hose clamps.
Please confirm that you need the majority of the 1/4-inch hydraulic fittings in this kit before placing your order to avoid waste.
